families.lore: Born from the collision of an ancient glacier and a primordial volcano. Fire and ice eternally at war within one body. Appears only where elemental balance is shattered.

members.name: Paradoxius
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Seafloor Cavern back room when party has both a Fire and Ice type at lv60+.
members.sprite_prompt: A massive dragon split vertically in two halves, left half made of blazing fire and flowing magma with a red glowing eye, right half made of crystalline blue ice and frost with a blue glowing eye, imposing duality dragon body, endgame legendary boss creature, clean bold silhouette, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: Once the purest fairy queen, she drank from a poisoned wellspring to save her realm. The toxin corrupted her beauty into something far more dangerous.

members.name: Venomystic
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Petalburg Woods deepest grove at night with a Fairy-type holding Poison Barb.
members.sprite_prompt: A corrupted dark fairy queen with large tattered butterfly wings dripping toxic purple venom droplets, elegant crown of poisonous black thorns, flowing dark purple royal dress dissolving into poison mist, beautiful but deadly enchantress, glowing toxic green eyes, one hand raised casting dark magic, imposing endgame boss, clean design, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: The Primordial Moth existed before the first Pokemon. It feeds on starlight and its wing patterns contain the blueprints of creation. Seeing its wings fully open drives lesser beings to madness.

members.name: Entomoth
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Sky Pillar rooftop at nighttime. Must have a Bug-type in party.
members.sprite_prompt: A colossal primordial moth dragon emperor, massive ornate dark wings with hypnotic glowing cosmic eye patterns, draconic serpentine body covered in dark insectoid segmented armor, moth antennae curving into sharp dragon horns, ancient alien insect god radiating eerie light from wing eyes, imposing endgame moth dragon boss, clean bold silhouette, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: Exists simultaneously alive and dead, trapped between planes. Neither the living nor the dead can escape its grasp. It guards the threshold between worlds.

members.name: Limborion
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Mt. Pyre summit at midnight. Impossible to flee from (Shadow Tag). The only Normal/Ghost.
members.sprite_prompt: A spectral humanoid entity split vertically between life and death, left half is solid muscular living flesh with a golden eye and warm skin, right half is transparent ghostly skeleton with a hollow dark eye socket and spectral wisps, ethereal glowing chains binding both halves together, floating between two planes, eerie threshold guardian, imposing endgame boss, clean design, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: The World Tree is the source of all life energy. Its roots span continents and channel lightning from the sky into the earth. Cutting one root causes earthquakes across the world.

members.name: Yggdrathon
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Secret room behind the Fortree giant tree. Requires all 8 badges and a Grass-type at lv50+.
members.sprite_prompt: A massive sentient world-tree titan, thick ancient dark bark trunk forming a towering humanoid body, massive branch arms with lightning bolts crackling between them, deep root legs anchored to the ground, leaves glowing bright electric yellow with bio-electric energy, ancient tree of life channeling storms, dark green and electric yellow, imposing nature titan endgame boss, clean bold silhouette, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: An ancient stone judge that awakens once per millennium. Its fairy crystal heart grants the power to judge souls. Those deemed unworthy are petrified eternally.

members.name: Gargoliath
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Statue in Granite Cave deepest room. Interact after defeating Elite Four — it awakens.
members.sprite_prompt: A massive ancient stone gargoyle guardian with crystalline fairy wings, muscular grey stone body with glowing pink fairy gems embedded in chest and shoulders, large curving stone horns, sharp stone fangs, wings of carved stone shimmering with prismatic fairy dust, crouched powerful guardian pose ready to strike, imposing stone titan endgame boss, clean design, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: Born from the deepest underwater volcanic vent. Superheated water given form. Creates obsidian pillars wherever it walks and boils the ocean around it.

members.name: Abyssaldon
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Deepest chamber of Seafloor Cavern after Kyogre storyline. The water boils as you enter.
members.sprite_prompt: A deep-sea volcanic deity, body of black obsidian rock with bright orange magma cracks glowing throughout, superheated steam venting from fissures in its armor, aquatic fins and tail made of churning boiling water, molten orange core blazing in chest, primal fusion of deep ocean and volcanic fire, massive and ancient, imposing endgame boss, clean bold silhouette, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: An ornate suit of divine armor possessed by the undying spirit of an ancient warrior-king. He swore to guard the world for eternity, and death could not break his oath.

members.name: Spectraguard
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Sealed Chamber secret room. The armor stands motionless until you read the ancient inscription.
members.sprite_prompt: A massive haunted suit of ornate divine full plate armor, empty glowing spectral blue eyes behind decorated great helm visor, ghostly blue flames burning inside the hollow armor visible through the joints, wielding a massive spectral greatsword in right hand and a tower shield with ancient glowing crest in left hand, floating slightly off ground, eternal undead knight sentinel, imposing endgame boss, clean design, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite

families.lore: When the earth cracked open and the sky fell inward, Terracelest was born. It commands earthquakes with its legs and hurricanes with its wings. Where it walks, the landscape is forever changed.

members.name: Terracelest
members.encounter_note: Ultimate boss. Top of Sky Pillar after Rayquaza storyline. The sky darkens and the ground shakes as it descends.
members.sprite_prompt: A colossal elemental titan, lower body and powerful legs made of cracked brown rocky earth with orange magma veins, upper body chest and massive spread wings formed from dark storm clouds with lightning bolts arcing through them, where solid earth meets raging sky in one titanic bipedal being, earthquake below and hurricane above, elemental god of earth and atmosphere, imposing endgame boss, clean bold silhouette, dark detailed pixel art, 64x64 Pokemon GBA sprite
